title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at HP India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at HP India Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? HP India Advisory Limited in Noida offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About HP India Advisory Limited:
HP India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HP India Advisory Limited!
